function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.toy_forge_pla_bundle
alias: toy_forge_pla_bundle
purchased_on: 2025-12-04
total_eur: 72
counterparty: Filamenthütte Wien
project: Toy Forge Saturdays
related_entity: Badger
lines:
  - item: PLA spool mixed colors
    quantity: 3
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 72
---
# Family PLA spool bundle

```text
+----------------+---------------------------+
| field          | value                     |
+----------------+---------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                      |
| bill_id        | bill.toy_forge_pla_bundle |
| alias          | toy_forge_pla_bundle      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-12-04                |
| total_eur      | 72                        |
| counterparty   | Filamenthütte Wien        |
| project        | Toy Forge Saturdays       |
| related_entity | Badger                    |
+----------------+---------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                   | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | PLA spool mixed colors | 3   | 24       | 72       |
+---+------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                  |     |          | 72       |
+---+------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Older family-printing consumables that only got sorted once Toy Forge became a named lane.

next_step.current_state: First OCR write succeeded. Continue applying frontmatter to remaining three listed bill files, preserving original bodies exactly.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Delete inbox item then report completion
next_step.observation: The write to 50_finance/purchases/2025_12_04__eur_000072__bill__toy_forge_pla_bundle.md completed successfully.
